post.subject: "Alright, whats the craic?"
post.body: Someone please tell me what the fuck that means!! You know when someone walks down the road and says that to you, but they still walk on. Am I supposed to answer? Or should I just answer with, "Alright, hows it goin?" or "hows the craic?" I just dont know. It happens [almost] every day and i dont know what to say... If anyone has any suggestions as to how to answer the ignorant assholes in the world when they say this please tell me!
